title: Node.js Heap Out of Memory
content: Context: Node.js V8 engine memory limit reached. Symptoms: 'Allocation failed - JavaScript heap out of memory'. Action: Increase --max-old-space-size in Docker entrypoint. Check for memory leaks in global variables or unclosed EventEmitters.

title: Node.js Event Loop Blocked
content: Context: Synchronous code blocking the event loop. Symptoms: High latency, 504 Gateway Timeouts, heartbeat failures. Action: Profile with 'clinic.js'. Refactor synchronous FS or Crypto calls to their async versions.

title: Java JVM Metaspace OOM
content: Context: JVM Metaspace exhaustion (class metadata). Symptoms: java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Metaspace. Action: Increase -XX:MaxMetaspaceSize. Check for dynamic class loading leaks (common in old Spring/Hibernate versions).

title: Java GC Overhead Limit Exceeded
content: Context: JVM spending too much time in Garbage Collection. Symptoms: CPU spikes and minimal progress. Action: Increase Heap size (-Xmx). If persistence continues, analyze heap dump for memory leaks or object churn.

title: Python SIGKILL (OOM)
content: Context: Python process killed by OS due to memory pressure. Symptoms: Silent exit with code 137. Action: Check Pandas/NumPy large dataset handling. Use generators or 'del' variables to free memory early.

title: Python GIL Contention
content: Context: CPU-bound tasks blocked by Global Interpreter Lock. Symptoms: High CPU but slow performance in multithreaded apps. Action: Use 'multiprocessing' module instead of 'threading' for CPU-heavy tasks.

title: K8s CrashLoopBackOff - Config
content: Context: Application fails at startup. Action: Check 'kubectl logs' and 'kubectl describe pod'. Common causes: Missing Environment Variables, Secret not mounted, or incorrect ConfigMap key.

title: K8s Liveness Probe Failure
content: Context: K8s kills pod because it thinks it's dead. Symptoms: Constant restarts. Action: Check if initialDelaySeconds is too low. Verify if the /health endpoint is blocked by a long-running startup task.

title: K8s ImagePullBackOff
content: Context: Container runtime cannot fetch image. Action: Verify image name/tag. Check 'imagePullSecrets' for private registries and verify node internet connectivity.

title: PostgreSQL Connection Pool Exhausted
content: Context: Too many active connections. Symptoms: 'remaining connection slots are reserved'. Action: Implement PgBouncer. Check application side for unclosed DB connections in 'finally' blocks.

title: Redis OOM - Maxmemory policy
content: Context: Redis reached maxmemory limit. Action: Check 'maxmemory-policy'. Use 'allkeys-lru' for caching. Monitor fragmentation ratio (mem_fragmentation_ratio).

title: Nginx 502 Bad Gateway
content: Context: Ingress cannot reach backend pod. Action: Verify if the backend service port matches the pod port. Check if the backend application is actually listening on 0.0.0.0.
